name: obsidian-direct
description: Web editor for Obsidian vaults over SSH

scripts.css:watch: mkdir -p dist/web && bunx tailwindcss -i web/input.css -o dist/web/styles.css --watch
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/web && cp web/index.html dist/web/index.html && bun build web/main.ts --outdir dist/web --minify --target browser && bun run css:build
scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run --watch src/server.ts" "bun build web/main.ts --outdir dist/web --watch --target browser" "bun run css:watch"
